title: Summarization & Translation Metrics
content:
# Interview Prep: Generation Evals

## Q1: Why is the Brevity Penalty (BP) required in BLEU evaluations?

### Standard Answer
Without the brevity penalty, a model could generate extremely short outputs containing only high-confidence words (e.g. 'the') to achieve perfect precision. The brevity penalty scales the score down if the candidate translation length is shorter than the reference translation length.
